dm_standards_chapter: Chapter 13 - Development Management Standards (Volume I Written Statement, p.316+)
fetch_method: curl.exe raw PDF download (adopted Volume I accessible version, 25.1MB) + local pdftotext extraction
notes: Dedicated Chapter 13 within Volume I (raw is full Volume I, 18k text lines). Captured site coverage 50/75/60/66/80%, plot ratio (Table 13.1), 22m + 2.0-2.5m separation, private OS Table 13.3 (55/60/75 m2), public OS 15/10/20%, sightlines Table 13.5 (up to 215m), junction setbacks, car(max)/cycle(min) Table 13.6, shower standards, full AA/EIA/FRA/EcIA triggers (13.2). No single numeric one-off site area in Ch13 (rural criteria in Chapter 3 + per-site percolation/design guide).
